macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: IMF Warns Persistent High Oil Prices Could Trigger Global Recession
items.summary: The International Monetary Fund warned that if crude oil prices remain between $120-$130 per barrel until 2027, the global economy could fall into a technical recession. IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva stated policymakers must prepare for this risk, noting that depleting crude inventories and summer demand rebound are narrowing the margin for oil market stability.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Over $326 Million in Crypto Long Positions Liquidated in 24 Hours
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market saw sharp volatility after more than $326 million in long positions were liquidated over the past 24 hours, drawing attention from traders and analysts.

items.title: Bitcoin Slips Near $79,600 as Broader Crypto Market Weakens
items.summary: Bitcoin dropped to around $79,600 amid a 1.6% decline in the broader crypto market, influenced by inflation concerns, profit-booking, and macroeconomic data.

items.title: Bitcoin Risks Slump After Hitting Major Bear Market Resistance
items.summary: Bitcoin fell 2.3% to $79,300 in the last 24 hours after rallying since early April, facing resistance as traders shift to riskier assets.

items.title: Bitcoin Slips Below $80,000 as Crypto Market Pulls Back
items.summary: Bitcoin dropped below $80,000 with the total crypto market value sliding 1.3% to $2.66 trillion, despite a 6.1% rise in trading volume to $33.76 billion.

items.title: 3 Signs of a Bearish Crypto Market as Bitcoin Falls Below $79K
items.summary: Bitcoin fell below $79,000 during a 6-hour sell-off triggered by accelerating inflation data, signaling bearish market conditions.

items.title: Bitcoin Price Slips Below $80,000 After 200-Day Moving Average Rejection
items.summary: Bitcoin's 37% rally was rejected at the 200-day moving average, falling below $80,000, with warnings that the push to $83,000 relied on perpetual futures rather than spot demand.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Fields Medalist Reports GPT-5.5 Pro Achieves PhD-Level Math Research in One Hour
items.summary: Fields medalist Timothy Gowers revealed that OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Pro generated PhD-level additive number theory research in about an hour. Google DeepMind also published an agentic co-mathematician workbench.

items.title: Google Flags Adversaries Using AI-Augmented Exploit Research for 2FA Bypass
items.summary: Google Threat Intelligence Group reported threat actors leveraging AI to identify and exploit a 2FA bypass vulnerability in server tools, highlighting risks in agent permissions and API key aggregation.

items.title: Google Releases Multi-Token Prediction Drafters for Gemma 4, Boosting Inference 3x
items.summary: Google launched multi-token prediction drafters for Gemma 4 using speculative decoding, achieving up to 3x faster inference without quality loss, aiding local models and edge deployment.

items.title: Google Unveils Gemini Intelligence for Proactive, Personalized Android Experience
items.summary: Google introduced Gemini Intelligence, enhancing Android with advanced automation, intelligent form filling, voice refinement, and custom widgets, rolling out first on Samsung Galaxy and Pixel devices.

items.title: Meta Hires Four More Researchers from OpenAI
items.summary: Meta recruited OpenAI researchers Shengjia Zhao, Jiahui Yu, Shuchao Bi, and Hongyu Ren, continuing its talent acquisition from the AI leader.

items.title: Axiom's AI Prover Scores Perfect 120/120 on Putnam Math Competition
items.summary: Axiom founder Carina Hong announced their AI achieved a perfect score on the Putnam exam, surpassing top humans (110) and LLMs like DeepSeek (103), and 98.93% on Lean verification benchmarks.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Google Makes iPhone to Android Switching Easier
items.summary: Google has introduced new features to simplify the process of switching from iPhone to Android devices, making migration more seamless for users.

items.title: Microsoft Adds Tab Intelligence to Edge Browser
items.summary: Microsoft has rolled out a new Copilot update for Edge that uses AI to intelligently pull and organize information across open tabs for improved productivity.

items.title: Windows Update Gets Automatic Driver Rollback Feature
items.summary: Microsoft introduces Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery to automatically roll back faulty drivers that cause Windows Update issues, improving system stability.

items.title: Instagram Launches Instants for Ephemeral Photo Sharing
items.summary: Instagram has debuted a new Snapchat-like feature called Instants that allows users to share view-once photos with specific people.

items.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Gets Android 17 Features via One UI 9 Beta
items.summary: Samsung has released a One UI 9 beta update bringing Android 17 features to the Galaxy S26, with a detailed changelog now available.

items.title: Dell's SupportAssist Software Confirmed to Cause Windows BSOD Crashes
items.summary: Dell has confirmed that its SupportAssist software is responsible for causing Blue Screen of Death crashes on Windows systems.

items.title: Trump T1 Phone Shipping Expected This Week
items.summary: Trump Mobile CEO announces that the Trump T1 phones are set to begin shipping this week, though terms and conditions provide flexibility on delivery timelines.
